notes.basic: Stronger with a token start, turn 4 shop RNG weakness. No heropower requirement.
notes.fast-basic: Stronger with a token start, turn 4 shop RNG weakness. No heropower requirement.
notes.jeef: Uses tier 1 economy and strong pairs for a flexible start to the game with its variations.
notes.fast-jeef: Uses tier 1 economy and strong pairs for a flexible start to the game with its variations. Pushes levels quickly.
notes.slow-jeef: Uses tier 1 economy and strong pairs for a flexible start to the game with its variations. Stays on tier 2 to solidify the board.
notes.warrior: A highly valueable line if tier 1 economy and forced triples are strong.
notes.extended-warrior: A highly valueable line if tier 1 economy and forced triples are strong. This variant is a fallback option in case a triple hasn't shown up yet playing regular warrior curve.
notes.basic-yogg: Uses a 2-cost heropower to get to tier 3 faster.
notes.aggro-yogg: Uses a 2-cost heropower to get good tier 1s on board before leveling to 3 faster
notes.rafaam: Clean leveling using 1-cost heropower, 2-cost heropower with economy, or tavern tippers
notes.slow-rafaam: Clean leveling using 1-cost heropower, 2-cost heropower with economy, or tavern tippers. Cut off on tier 2 to get stronger
notes.3-on-3: Sacrifices early health to get very fast access to tier 3 minions, then pushes levels
notes.3-on-3-bis: Sacrifices early health to fill the board with tier 3 minions
notes.4-on-4: Sacrifices early health to get very fast access to tier 3 minions. A fallback option in case of a bad shop after 3 on 3; requires economy
notes.toki: A way to use 1 cost heropowers that don't provide tempo
notes.pocky: A very niche use for 1 cost heropowers

tips.deck_merge: You can assign a deck as a new version of another one by dragging it on top of the old one
tips.collection_stats: You can see the card history and global stats for the displayed sets, and switch between them at any time
tips.lottery: You can participate in monthly lottery to win premium Firestone subscriptions (enable it from the Settings > General > Lottery page)
tips.achievements_pick_for_me: You can let the app pick 3 achievements to track for you
tips.achievements_pin: Select any number of achievements to track them during gameplay, and see them update them in real time
tips.share_profile_page: Access your own profile page online, and share it with others to show off your achievements and stats
tips.contextual_related_cards: Mouse over certain cards in the tracker to have more info on what they will do
tips.etc_buddies: When playing as E.T.C. Band Manager, you can see all the buddies in the Discover pool
tips.bg_hero_select: You can get stats for each hero, directly on the hero selection screen
tips.bg_wisdomball: You can get advice from some of the best players in the game directly from the overlay and adopt their strategies
tips.bg_tab_key: Press "Tab" to get a quick overview of the progress of all players in the lobby
tips.guess_the_weight: Some cards have contextual help during Discovers
tips.discover_highlight: Mousing over a card while Discovering highlights the relevant information in your deck
tips.minion_play_order: The number at the top of each minion on board gives you the order in which they arrived - which is the order in which Deathrattles resolve
tips.minion_auto_highlight: Some minions are auto-buys with the right hero (like Freedealing Gambler with Patches). Firestone automatically highlights these in the shop for you.
tips.minions_list_by_tribe: You can activate an option to group minions by tribe in the minions list. This also lets you get rid of the tribes widget, which frees some space.
tips.mercs_terasure_highlight: Mousing over a treasure in Mercs highilghts the synergies in your team
tips.quest_stats: See the Quests' average Turns to complete and the Rewards average placement directly in the overlay
tips.constructed_deck_stats_free: Browse the current top decklists for free!
tips.constructed_deck_stats: View detailed card stats (like mulligan and draw winrates), as well as stats for whole archetypes.
tips.tip-0: If you have any feedback, bug or just want to get in touch, please visit us on Discord (link at the top)!
tips.tip-1: Clicca sull'icona "Aiuto" in alto per visualizzare le ultime note di rilascio dell'app
tips.tip-2: Clicca sull'icona "Bug" in alto per segnalare un bug o suggerire un miglioramento
tips.tip-3: Se stai riscontrando grossi bug (come la collezione che non si sincronizza, il tracker che non funziona, etc.), prova a eseguire l'app come Amministratore.
tips.tip-4: Le Impostazioni hanno molte opzioni di personalizzazione, non esitare a dare un'occhiata per abilitare/disabilitare alcune funzionalità
tips.tip-5: [Mercenaries] Vedi la colonna delle "Monete Totali" rendendo la finestra più ampia
tips.tip-6: [Mercenaries] Seleziona l'opzione "Mercenari (PvP)" nei Replay per visualizzare ulteriori dettagli sui Team in ogni partita
tips.tip-8: [Battlegrounds] Visualizza le statistiche live dettagliate in una partita, portando avanti la finestra Campi di Battaglia con Alt + B
tips.tip-9: [Battlegrounds] Rendi la finestra CB più ampia per visualizzare il danno medio e le probabilità letali nel simulatore
tips.tip-10: [Duels] Puoi passare col mouse sulla salute dell'Avversario per vederne la salute massima
tips.tip-11: [Duels] Mousing over your opponent's name also reveals their class

third-party.intro: Crediamo che i tuoi dati ti appartengano e che tu dovresti poterli sincronizzare con altri siti web di terze parti e aiutarli a fare ciò che fanno meglio con essi. Non siamo pagati per farlo, ma riceviamo della visibilità poiché poi loro parlano di noi :)

vs.pitch: Vicious Syndicate builds a weekly meta report that captures what the meta looks, using both data coming from thousands of games and insights by top-level players. You can visit them {{websiteLink}}
vs.next: Se decidi di contribuire al Rapporto vS Data Reaper, Firestone invierà anonimamente loro le info sulle tue partite (principalmente le carte giocate da ogni giocatore e alcuni meta-dati, come i ranghi del giocatore).
vs.toggle-label: Contribuisci al Rapporto di vS Data Reaper

ooc.pitch: Out of Games is a Hearthstone community site with articles, guides, decks, card database, and more. Syncing your card collection to the site makes it easier to find decks to play. You can visit them {{websiteLink}}
ooc.next: If you connect your Out of Games account, Firestone will send your collection data to Out of Games so you can use it online.
ooc.toggle-label: Mostra notifica quando la collezione è sincronizzata
ooc.title: Out of Games

hearthpwn.title: Hearthpwn
hearthpwn.pitch: Hearthpwn is one of the biggest community websites that shares decks, articles, and more. Syncing your card collection to the site makes it easier to find decks to play and view stats on your collection. You can visit them {{websiteLink}}
hearthpwn.next: If you decide to sync to Hearthpwn, Firestone will send them your collection data, so you can view stats on your collection.

d0nkey.pitch: d0nkey.top è un sito web di fan che raccoglie tutti i mazzi dalle competizioni ufficiali di Hearthstone, nonché i mazzi degli streamer per consentire a chiunque di trovare facilmente mazzi interessanti con cui giocare. Sincronizzarsi a d0nkey.top ti consentirà di condividere i tuoi mazzi col tuo pubblico (se sei uno streamer) o li aiuterà a creare un database migliore per fornire ulteriori servizi gratuiti alla community. Puoi visitarli a {{websiteLink}}
d0nkey.next: Se decidi di sincronizzare con d0nkey.top, Firestone invierà loro ogni partita che giochi, che comparirà in una sezione specifica sul sito web (che è ancora in costruzione). I replay saranno privati di default, a meno che tu non sia in streaming allo stesso momento. Visita la {{link}} per scoprire come configurare tutto.
d0nkey.toggle-label: Sincronizza i tuoi replay su d0nkey.top

hsdecks.pitch: Hearthstone-decks.net condivide i Mazzi giocati in High Legend per tutte le modalità costruite, Notizie e Articoli. Puoi visitarli a {{websiteLink}}
hsdecks.next: Se decidi di sincronizzarti con hearthstone-decks.net, Firestone invierà loro ogni partita che giochi anonimamente con alcune informazioni sulle tue partite (Codice del Mazzo, Rango, Risultati della Partita)
hsdecks.toggle-label: Sincronizza i tuoi replay a hearthstone-decks.net

bug-report.simulator-bug-text: Se desideri segnalare un bug con il simulatore (e desideri aiutarmi il più possibile), sei pregato di controllare la quida
bug-report.general-bug-text: Per ulteriori grandi problemi (app non funzionante), potete trovare alcuni utili passaggi di risoluzione dei problemi

bug-report.status-done: Feedback inviato. Grazie per averci contattati! Resta aggiornato unendoti a noi su {{discordLink}} o su {{twitterLink}}

twitch.title: Trasmetti su Twitch
twitch.intro: L'estensione di Twitch di Firestone ti consente di trasmettere mostrando il monitoraggio del tuo mazzo nel lettore di Twitch, nonché di consentire al pubblico di passare col mouse su tutti i giocatori nella classifica nei Campi di Battaglia. Per attivarla, dovrai:
twitch.todo-1: 1. Installare l'estensione Firestone Twitch sul tuo canale:
twitch.todo-2: 2. Connettere il tuo profilo di Twitch a Firestone cliccando il pulsante seguente
twitch.delay-label-tooltip: Posponi gli eventi inviati a Twitch di questa quantità di millisecondi. Utile se la tua streaming è in ritardo per combattere gli stream sniper
twitch.appear-on-live-streams-tooltip: Appear on the "Live Streams" tab. This feature, still under development, will list all streamers currently using Firestone as well as their current game type, list (if applicable), and a link to go to their Twitch stream.

discord.discord-presence-tooltip: Show that you use Firestone in Discord (it changes the default status from "Playing Hearthstone" to "Playing HS with Firestone")
discord.activate-custom-in-game-text-tooltip: Customize the text that will appear when users click on your username and Hearthstone is running
discord.activate-custom-in-match-text-tooltip: Customize the text that will appear when users click on your username and you're in a match

in-game-details.text: You can customize the text that is displayed when you are in a match. You can use the following placeholders:
in-game-details.text-2: Need some more placeholder customization? Let me know on {{discordLink}}!

tokens.rank: Your current rank in the mode (League + Rank in Ranked, Rating for Battlegrounds)
tokens.hero: The full name of your current hero
tokens.deckname: The name of your current deck

launch.title: Launch options
launch.launch-on-game-start-tooltip: Quando disattivato, devi avviare manualmente Firestone ogni volta
launch.integrated-mode-tooltip: Quando attivato, la finestra principale diventa una sovrapposizione ed è legata alla finestra di gioco. Usarlo è consigliato per le configurazioni a monitor singolo o se desideri trasmettere l'app. Modificare questo valore chiuderà e poi riaprirà la finestra delle Impostazioni e la finestra Principale
launch.session-recap-on-exit-tooltip: Mostra un riepilogo dell'ultima sessione uscendo da Hearthstone
launch.close-to-tray-tooltip: Close the app to the system tray instead of exiting it. Not recommended, as closing the app completely is a good way to make sure resources are properly freed regularly.
launch.xp-recap-on-game-end-label: Mostra il riepilogo degli XP alla fine della partita
launch.xp-recap-on-game-end-tooltip: Mostra un riepilogo degli XP / livelli ottenuti dopo ogni partita
launch.hide-release-notes-label: Nascondi le note di rilascio all'avvio dell'app
launch.hide-release-notes-tooltip: Non mostrare le nuove note di rilascio per la nuova versione di Firestone
launch.allow-games-share-tooltip: Allow the app to showcase your games (and decklist). The share will be anonymous, but if you're working on secret decklists, you might want to turn that off.
launch.enable-mailbox-tooltip: Show the Mailbox menu, which lets you access the latest important Hearthstone news in-app.
launch.enable-mailbox-unread-tooltip: Show a red dot on the Mailbox icon when you have unread messages.
launch.display-notifications-tooltip: Attiva/Disattiva la visibilità globale delle notifiche a tendina [bottom-right]. Quando attiva, puoi comunque configurare le notifiche per modalità di gioco nelle schede corrispondenti
launch.flash-window-tooltip: Esegue il flash della finestra HS al tuo turno, o all'avvio della fase di Reclutamento in CB
launch.show-notification-tooltip: Show a Windows notification on your turn, or when the Recruit phase starts in BG
launch.zoom-tooltip: Un livello d'ingrandimento che sarà applicato a tutte le finestre
launch.reset-prefs-tooltip: Ripristina TUTTE le tue preferenze, inclusi le varie posizioni dei widget sullo schermo
launch.reset-prefs-confirmation: Tutte le tue preferenze sono state ripristinate. Ciò include le posizioni dei vari widget sullo schermo, nonché le tue impostazioni di Twitch, non dimenticarti di riconfigurare ciò che ti serve :)

localization.title: Localizzazione
localization.text-1: La traduzione dell'app è effettuata dalla community, da persone come voi che hanno generosamente impiegato tempo e lavoro per consentire a tutti di usare l'app nella lingua di loro scelta. Come tale, sei pregato di godere del e rispettare il loro lavoro.
localization.text-11: Questo significa anche che non tutte le parti dell'app saranno tradotte nella vostra lingua. In quel caso, le parti mancanti saranno visualizzate in inglese.
localization.text-2: Se desideri aiutare a tradurre l'app, sei pregato di dare un'occhiata alle istruzioni {{link}}.
localization.text-3: Sei pregato di riavviare l'app (con il pulsante nella scheda Generale sulla sinistra), per assicurarti che la nuova lingua sia presa in considerazione.

premium.title: Premium subscription options
premium.text-1: Becoming a Premium user is the best way to support the app and the work I do to improve Firestone. In addition, you get a bunch of features, like Overlay widgets, a website with your own Profile page, and much more. You can find the details of all the premium features {{link}}.
premium.lottery-block-text1: Taking part in the lottery lets you accumulate points by doing some actions while playing games (like spending resources) with the lottery window visible. At the end of every two weeks, 2 winners will be picked at random (the more points you have, the more chances you have to win). The winners will get a 2-month Premium subscription, and will be announced on {{twitterLink}} and {{discordLink}}.
premium.lottery-block-text2: Once a new lottery season starts, points from previous seasons are reset.
premium.lottery-block-text3: Note: if you have multiple screens, try to toggle the "Set Overlay" setting off in the widget, and move it to a second screen.
premium.lottery-block-text4: Note: if you're a Premium user, opting in the lottery WILL NOT show you ads - and if you win, we'll see together for a prize of equivalent value.
premium.lottery-premium-section-tooltip: This section is only available to Premium users

data.remote-intro-text: Firestone stores most of your data online, to make it easy to use it across different computers. Some of that data is cached locally to improve the loading time of the app and reduce the bandwidth usage. You can however force a refresh of that data with the buttons below, typically after you've switched computers.
data.export-settings-button-tooltip: Export your settings to a file, which you can then import on another computer
data.import-settings-button-tooltip: Import your settings from a file, which you might have exported from another computer
data.disable-local-cache-tooltip: Disable the local cache of your games. This will force the app to retrieve all your games from the server, which will slow down the loading of the app a bit. Disabling the local cache will also clear the existing cache.
data.clear-local-cache-tooltip: Clear your full local cache, meaning all the data will be retrieved from the server the next time you start the app. Use this if you've played without Firestone on.
data.total-games: The app has retrieved a total of {{value}} games
data.packs-tooltip: Refresh your packs. This is automatically done every 7 days.
data.games-tooltip: Refresh your games. It will retrieve all your games since you started using the app, and it might take a while
data.clear-games-tooltip: Clear your games, and reload the latest games based on your preferences (last 100 days by default, you can change that by enabling the Advanced Settings). This might be useful if you have a lot of games and feel that the app is using too much RAM

quests.title: Missioni
quests.enable-quests-tooltip: Show a widget in the various game modes that recaps your ongoing quests
quests.show-when-empty-tooltip: If toggled on, the quests widget will show even when all the quests are completed
quests.show-in-game-tooltip: If toggled off, the quests widget will be hidden while in a game
quests.constructed-tooltip: Show the quest widgets for the original Hearthstone quests in Constructed, Duels, Tavern Brawl and Friendly matches and on their main screens
quests.constructed-on-hub-tooltip: Show the quest widgets for the original Hearthstone quests in the Hub (the main screen where you can choose which mode to play)
quests.constructed-on-bg-tooltip: Show the quest widgets for the original Hearthstone quests on the BG screens
quests.battlegrounds-tooltip: Show the quest widgets for Battlegrounds missions in BG matches and on the BG main screen
quests.mercenaries-tooltip: Show the tasks widgets on all the Mercenaries screens. Activating the Tasks widget will remove the Tasks button from the Team list.

widgets.size-tooltip: Modify globally the size of all the app's widgets
widgets.card-tooltip-number-of-related-cards-too: The maximum number of related cards to show in the card tooltip. If there are more cards than this number, you will instead see a generic message with the number of related cards.
widgets.counters-opacity-tooltip: Modify the opacity of all the app's counters
widgets.lock-widgets-tooltip: Lock the widgets in place, so they can't be moved around
widgets.use-grouped-counters-tooltip: Group all counters (yours and your opponent's) in a single compact list
widgets.counters-widgets-size-tooltip: Modify the size of the widgets that can appear when mousing over some counters, like Rafaams list

general.show-hero-selection-overlay-tooltip: (Premium-only) Show stats while picking your hero
general.show-card-stats-discover-tooltip: Show stats while Discovering cards. Non-premium users can use it for {{freeUses}} games per day, while Premium users have unlimited access
general.show-draft-tracker-tooltip: Show the tracker while drafting, which lets you highlights synergies when mousing over the pick options
general.show-draft-tracker-pick-rate-tooltip: Show the pick rate information on every card of your deck in the draft tracker
general.show-draft-tracker-impact-tooltip: Show the deck winrate impact of every card of your deck in the draft tracker
general.show-impact-on-redraft: Only show stats on deck edit
general.show-impact-on-redraft-tooltip: Only show the impact / pickrate stats when removing cards from deck
general.show-current-options-tooltip: Show the cards you're currently being offered in the draft tracker, so that you can more easily interact with them, see related cards, etc.

session-widget.title: Season recap
session-widget.label: Mostra widget
session-widget.label-tooltip: Show a recap of the current Arena season
session-widget.show-groups-tooltip: Show a recap of your season runs, grouped by wins.
session-widget.show-groups-in-game-tooltip: Toggle off to hide the grouped information while in game
session-widget.show-runs-in-game-tooltip: Toggle off to hide the latest runs while in game
session-widget.show-in-game-tooltip: Show the widget while in a game. Toggle off to only show it during the draft
session-widget.number-of-runs-tooltip: Maximum number of runs to show when showing run details (most recent is at the top)

general.hide-games-vs-ai-tooltip: Hide games vs AI when viewing the full the replay list

global.title: Attiva / Disattiva funzionalità
global.minions-play-order-tooltip: Mostra l'ordine di gioco di ogni minion sul tavolo, per aiutarti a monitorare gli ordini di Risoluzione del Rantolo di Morte (o tutto ciò che fa affidamento sull'ordine in cui i minion sono arrivati sul tavolo)
global.weapons-play-order-tooltip: Also include weapons in the play order
global.streamer-mode-tooltip: Replace your name and your opponent's name by "You" and "Opponent". This mirrors the game's Streamer Mode functionality that is activated by pressing Ctrl + Shift + S while in a match.
global.show-title-bar-tooltip: Mostra/nascondi il nome del mazzo e le carte rimanenti in mano e nel mazzo
global.show-control-bar-tooltip: Mostra/nascondi la barra con il logo e i pulsanti di controllo
global.show-rarity-color-tooltip: Colora il costo di mana delle carte nel monitoraggio a seconda della rarità della carta
global.show-transformed-into-tooltip: Add the card into which a card was transformed in the tracker
global.show-deck-winrate: Mostra tasso di vittorie del mazzo
global.show-deck-winrate-tooltip: Mostra il tasso di vittorie in Classifica complessivo del mazzo sul monitoraggio, se abbiamo i dati (in Standard o Selvaggia, a seconda della modalità di gioco corrente)
global.show-matchup-winrate-tooltip: Mostra il tasso di vincita in Classifica generale del mazzo rispetto la classe dell'avversario sul monitoraggio, se abbiamo i dati (in Standard o Selvaggia, a seconda della modalità di gioco corrente)
global.show-gifts-separately-tooltip: Display cards that have been created in their own lines (one line for each different creator). Doesn't work in the Legacy display mode.
global.show-gifts-in-separate-zone-tooltip: Move the generated cards from the "Other" zone to a new "Other (gifts)" collapsible zone.
global.group-same-cards-tooltip: Group all the cards with the same card ID together, independently of whether they were discarded, dead, burnt, played with a different mana cost, etc.
global.show-plagues-on-top-tooltip: Show all the Death Knight Plagues together at the top of the deck, so it's easier to keep track of them.
global.show-board-in-separate-zone-tooltip: Move the cards on the board from the "Other" zone to a new "Board" collapsible zone.
global.show-hero-power-in-board-zone: Show hero power in board zone
global.show-hero-power-in-board-zone-tooltip: Show the hero power of the player in the "Board" zone. This helps for dynamic pools display and some highlights.
global.reset-deck-position-after-trade-tooltip: After trading a Tradeable card, that card could in theory be place at the bottom of the deck. So by default, when a Trade happens, the "Top of Deck" and "Bottom of Deck" sections are cleared. Toggle this option off if you want the sections to keep their previous values even after a Trade.
global.show-stats-change-tooltip: Mostra le statistiche modificate per alcune carte nell'elenco del mazzo (es. Incendia, Martello da Fabbro)
global.show-cost-reduction-tooltip: Potenzia il costo di mana delle carte nel mazzo quando il loro costo è stato modificato da un effetto (es. Flusso dell'Incantatore)
global.show-unknown-cards-tooltip: Aggiungi una voce "Carta sconosciuta" nel monitoraggio per le carte su cui non hai alcuna informazione
global.highlight-related-cards-tooltip: Quando attivo, le carte correlate saranno evidenziate sul tuo elenco del mazzo passando col mouse su carte specifiche (per esempio, passare sul Doppio Salto nel tuo elenco del mazzo evidenzierà tutte le carte Relitto nel tuo mazzo)
global.discover-help-tooltip: Shows contextual help when Discovering cards. It can range from simply highlighting related cards in your deck to providing more specific information.
global.hand-sort-by-zone-order: Hand / Board sort by zone order
global.hand-sort-by-zone-order-tooltip: Sort the hand and board (when visible) by zone order, so the cards in the hand / board are displayed in the order they appear in-game
global.close-tracker-on-end: Chiudi monitoraggio alla fine della partita
global.close-tracker-on-end-tooltip: Chiude automaticamente il monitoraggio alla fine della partita. Se disabilitato, dev'esser chiuso manualmente
global.close-tracker-on-end-advanced: Capito, Firestone non chiuderà il monitoraggio al termine della partita
global.reset-button-tooltip: Ripristina le posizioni del monitoraggio del mazzo. Questo può risolvere un problema in cui il monitoraggio non appare più sullo schermo
global.reset-button-confirmation: Le posizioni del monitoraggio del mazzo sono state ripristinate e saranno applicate nella tua prossima partita.
global.counters-use-expanded-view-tooltip: When applicable, counters tooltips will display items on separate lines

max-resources-widget.title: Max resources widget
max-resources-widget.toggle-tooltip: When your max health / mana changes, shows a widget that displays the maximum resources you can have in a game
max-resources-widget.show-horizontally-tooltip: Show max resources on a single line, instead of a single column
max-resources-widget.always-on-tooltip: Show the widget even when the max health / mana hasn't changed

modes.title: Il monitoraggio del mazzo è attivo per le seguenti modalità

opponent-deck.show-tracker-tooltip: Quando attivo, apparirà un monitoraggio per le carte del tuo avversario
opponent-deck.ai-decklist-tooltip: Quando attivo, il monitoraggio proverà a caricare l'elenco di mazzi dell'avversario IA corrente. Sappi che alcuni mazzi sono pseudo-casuali, quindi l'elenco di mazzi sarà spesso solo indicativo
opponent-deck.known-decklist-tooltip: When active, the tracker will try to load the decklist of the current opponent if is a known list at the start of the game (like when playing the Whizbang's Heroes Twist season)
opponent-deck.group-cards-by-zone-tooltip: When active, the tracker will split the cards into collapsable sections (Deck, Hand and Other), which enable some new features. Turn that off to use the Legacy display mode, where all cards are grouped together in a single section
opponent-deck.used-cards-go-to-bottom-label: Le carte usate vanno in fondo
opponent-deck.used-cards-go-to-bottom-tooltip: Quando attivo, le carte usate sono mostrate in fondo all'elenco. Può esser attivato solo se l'opzione Raggruppa le carte per zone è disabilitata
opponent-deck.darken-used-cards-tooltip: Quando attivo, le carte usate sono oscurate.
opponent-deck.global-effects-tooltip: Quando attivo, compare una nuova sezione in cima al monitoraggio che mostra gli effetti globali inflitti al giocatore / mazzo
opponent-deck.current-effects-tooltip: When active, a new section appears at the top of the tracker that shows current effects affecting the player / deck
opponent-deck.current-effects-use-enchantment-name-too: When active, the name of the enchantment will be used instead of the name of the card
opponent-deck.sort-by-mana-cost-label: Ordina carte per costo di mana
opponent-deck.sort-by-mana-cost-tooltip: Quando attivo, le carte saranno ordinate per costo di mana nella zona Altre. Altrimenti, la zona mostrerà prima le carte sul tavolo, poi nel cimitero, poi le altre
opponent-deck.show-bottom-cards-separately-tooltip: Show the known cards at the bottom of the deck separately from the main deck
opponent-deck.show-top-cards-separately-tooltip: Show the known cards at the top of the deck separately from the main deck
opponent-deck.hide-generated-cards-tooltip: Hide cards that were created by other cards and that are not in hand or in deck. WARNING: hiding generated cards can cause some features to work in a degraded mode, like card highlights
opponent-deck.show-dk-runes-tooltip: Add a section at the top of the tracker showing the known Death Knights runes in the deck
opponent-deck.card-turn-draw-tooltip: Mostra il turno in cui una carta nella mano dell'avversario è stata pescata
opponent-deck.guessed-cards-tooltip: Mostra quale carta è nella mano dell'avversario quando la conosciamo (dopo che è stata rimandata alla mano con un Sap, ad esempio)
opponent-deck.buff-in-hand-tooltip: Mostra i buff che influenzano le carte nella mano dell'avversario
opponent-deck.sequence-info-tooltip: For cards that create multiple different cards of hand in your opponent hand, show an indicator to help you identify which is which
opponent-deck.enable-secret-helper-tooltip: Quando attivo, un popup con tutti i segreti possibili comparirà ogni qual volta un avversario gioca un segreto

counters.title: Contatori
counters.galakrond-tooltip: Mostra il numero di volte in cui il tuo avversario ha invocato Galakrond (appare solo quando l'avversario gioca Galakrond o una carta che lo invoca)
counters.pogo-tooltip: Mostra il numero di volte che il tuo avversario ha giocato un Saltatore di Pogo
counters.astral-automaton-tooltip: Show the number of times your opponent has summoned an Astral Automaton
counters.discovers-tooltip: Counts the number of times your opponent has Discovered a card
counters.earthen-golem-tooltip: Show the number of times your opponent has summoned an Earthen Golem
counters.jade-tooltip: Mostra le dimensioni correnti dei Golem di Giada del tuo avversario
counters.cthun-tooltip: Mostra la dimensione corrente del C'Thun del tuo avversario
counters.fatigue-tooltip: Show your opponent's next fatigue damage
counters.abyssal-curse-tooltip: Show your opponent's highest Abyssal Curse damage
counters.attack-on-board-tooltip: Mostra l'attacco totale dei minion del tavolo del tuo avversario + il suo eroe
counters.watch-post-tooltip: Mostra il numero totale di posti di guardia giocati in questa partita. Appare solo se le carte rilevanti sono trovate nel mazzo o in mano
counters.libram-tooltip: Mostra il numero totale di librami giocati in questa partita. Appare solo se sono trovate carte rilevanti nel mazzo o in mano
counters.elwynn-boar-tooltip: Mostra il numero di volte in cui un Cinghiale di Elwyinn è morto per il tuo avversario
counters.volatile-skeleton-tooltip: Show the number of times a Volatile Skeleton died for your opponent
counters.chaotic-tendril-tooltip: Show the number of times your opponent played a Chaotic Tendril
counters.damage-taken-on-your-turn-tooltip: Gives you information on the damage your opponent has taken on their turns (number of times and total damage) when they are playing as {{classes}}
counters.relic-tooltip: Show the power of your opponent's next Demon Hunter Relic
counters.excavate-tooltip: Show your opponent's current and maximum Excavate levels, and show the treasures they can get from their next Excavate tier when mousing over the counter
counters.number-of-spells-tooltip: Show the total number of spells your opponent played this match. Shows up only if they played at least one spell
counters.hero-power-damage-tooltip: Mostra il danno totale inflitto dal potere dell'eroe del tuo avversario in questa partita. Appare solo se la classe del rivale è Mago e ha inflitto almeno uno di danno
counters.hero-power-use-tooltip: Show the number of times you have used your hero power
counters.ysondre-tooltip: Show the number of times Ysondre died this game
counters.sea-shanty-tooltip: Shows the number of spells your opponent has cast on characters. Only shows up if opponent is Paladin
counters.holy-spells-tooltip: Show the number of holy spells your opponent has cast. Only shows up if opponent is Paladin
counters.imbue-tooltip: Show the number of times your opponent has imbued their hero power this game
counters.corpse-spent-tooltip: Show a counter with the total amount of corpses the opponent spent. It appears when the opponent has played one rune of each type, and is likely to have Climactic Nectrotic Explosion.
counters.corpses-tooltip: Show a counter with the current total corpses for the opponent - it appears when you know they have a corpse spending card and the game doesn't show the counter
counters.wheel-of-death-tooltip: After your opponent plays {{cardName}}, shows the number of turns before you die
counters.shockspitter-tooltip: Show the number of times your opponent has attacked this match. It shows up only if the opponent's class is Hunter and they have attacked at least once
counters.dragons-summoned-tooltip: Show the number of times your opponent summoned a Dragon.
counters.dragons-played-tooltip: Show the number of times your opponent played a Dragon.  Appears only if the opponent is Priest and played a dragon
counters.dead-minions-this-game-tooltip: Show the number of minions that died this game when your opponent is a Death Knight or they have a relevant card in hand or deck (for instance, Reska the Pit Boss)
counters.elemental-streak-tooltip: Counts how many turns in a row your opponent has played an elemental. Only appears if they played at least 2 elementals in a row.
counters.multicaster-tooltip: Show the spell schools of which your opponent played a spell this game
counters.cards-drawn-tooltip: When your opponent has {{cardName}} in their deck, or if they are {{cardClass}}, show the number of cards they have drawn this game
counters.protoss-spells-tooltip: Show the number of Protoss Spells your opponent has played this game. Shows only if they are Mage and have played at least one Protoss Spell
counters.libram-reduction-tooltip: Show the total cost reduction of your opponent's librams
counters.starships-launched-tooltip: Show the number of Starships your opponent has launched this game and their contents

your-deck.ignore-decklist-tooltip: Non caricare l'elenco di mazzi iniziali e monitora solo le carte giocate e pescate. Le modifiche saranno applicate per la prossima partita
your-deck.ignore-decklist-confirmation: Capito, il monitoraggio ignorerà il tuo elenco di mazzi
your-deck.discovery-zone-tooltip: When active, a new section appears in the tracker with the Discover options you're being offered. This lets you see related cards and highlight synergies with your deck.

counters.galakrond-tooltip: Mostra il numero di volte in cui hai invocato Galakrond (appare solo quando giochi Galakrond o una carta che lo Invoca)
counters.pogo-tooltip: Mostra il numero di volte in cui hai giocato un Saltatore di Pogo
counters.astral-automaton-tooltip: Show the number of times you have summoned an Astral Automaton
counters.earthen-golem-tooltip: Show the number of times you have summoned an Earthen Golem
counters.treant-tooltip: Show the number of times you summoned a Treant
counters.treant-dead-tooltip: Show the number of dead Treants this match
counters.dragons-summoned-tooltip: Show the number of times you summoned a Dragon
counters.discovers-tooltip: Counts the number of times you Discovered a card
counters.dragons-played-tooltip: Show the number of times you played a Dragon
counters.dragons-in-hand-tooltip: Show the number of Dragon cards in hand, for {{cardName}}
counters.gifts-played-tooltip: Show the number of cards you played that were created by another card
counters.ceaseless-expanse-tooltip: Show the number of times a card has been played, drawn or destroyed this game
counters.libram-reduction-tooltip: Show the total cost reduction of your librams
counters.imbue-tooltip: Show the number of times you have imbued your hero power this game
counters.protoss-minion-reduction-tooltip: Show the total cost reduction of your Protoss minions (both the ones that apply throughout the game, and the ones that apply only for the next minion)
counters.protoss-spells-tooltip: Show the number of Protoss Spells you have played this game, if {{cardName}} is in your deck
counters.dark-gifts-tooltip: Show the number of different Dark Gifts you have played this game
counters.colossus-damage-tooltip: Show the damage your Colossus will deal
counters.outcast-tooltip: Show the number of Outcast cards you've played this game
counters.undead-died-since-last-turn-tooltip: When Discovering a card, if one of them has the "friendly undead died since the end of your last turn" effect, show a counter telling you that the effect will activate
counters.dive-the-golakka-depths-tooltip: Show the number of times you have completed the {{cardName}} quest
counters.cards-played-this-turn-tooltip: Show the number of cards you have played this turn, if a card using it is in your deck
counters.next-starship-launch-tooltip: Show the cost reduction of your next Starship launch
counters.pirates-summoned-tooltip: Show the number of times you summoned a Pirate
counters.chaotic-tendril-tooltip: Show the number of times you played a Chaotic Tendril
counters.chained-guardian-tooltip: Show the number of plagues you shuffled into the opponent's deck
counters.jade-tooltip: Mostra le dimensioni correnti dei tuoi Golem di Giada
counters.cthun-tooltip: Mostra le dimensioni correnti del tuo C'Thun
counters.abyssal-curse-tooltip: Show your highest Abyssal Curse damage
counters.rafaam-time-tooltip: Tracks the Rafaams you've played this game
counters.windrunner-sisters-tooltip: Show which of the Windrunner sisters you have played this game
counters.attack-on-board-tooltip: Mostra l'attacco totale dei minion sul tuo tavolo + il tuo eroe
counters.number-of-spells-tooltip: Mostra il numero totale di incantesimi giocati in questa partita. Appare solo se le carte rilevanti si trovano nel mazzo o nella mano
counters.dragoncaller-alanna-tooltip: Show the number of spells costing 5 or more that you've cast this game
counters.elementals-tooltip: Mostra il numero totale di elementali giocati a questo turno e all'ultimo turno. Appare solo se sono trovate delle carti rilevanti nella tua mano
counters.watch-post-tooltip: Mostra il numero totale di posti di guardia che hai giocato in questa partita. Appare solo se le carte rilevanti sono trovate nel mazzo o in mano
counters.libram-tooltip: Mostra il numero totale di librami che hai giocato in questa partita. Appare solo se sono trovate le carte rilevanti nel mazzo o nella mano
counters.elwynn-boar-tooltip: Mostra il numero di volte in cui un Cinghiale di Elwynn è morto per te
counters.volatile-skeleton-tooltip: Show the number of times a Volatile Skeleton died for you
counters.relic-tooltip: Show the power of your next Demon Hunter Relic
counters.hero-power-damage-tooltip: Mostra il danno totale inflitto dal potere del tuo eroe in questa partita. Appare solo se l'Occhio di Fuoco di Mordresh o Jan'Alai il Dragofalco sono nel tuo mazzo o nella tua mano
counters.bolner-tooltip: Quando hai Bolner Hammerbeak in mano, mostra la prima carta di Grido di Battaglia giocata a questo turno, se presente
counters.brilliant-macaw-tooltip: Quando hai un Ara Brillante in mano, mostra l'ultima carta Grido della Battaglia che hai giocato, se presente
counters.monstrous-parrot-tooltip: When you have a Monstrous Parrot in hand, show the last friendly Deathrattle that triggered, if any
counters.vanessa-tooltip: When you have Vanessa VanCleef in hand, show the last card that your opponent played
counters.dead-minions-this-game-tooltip: Show the number of minions that died this game when you have a relevant card in hand or deck (for instance, Reska the Pit Boss)
counters.dead-minions-this-turn-tooltip: Show the number of minions that died this turn
counters.friendly-dead-minions-this-game-tooltip: Show the number of friendly minions that died this game when you have a relevant card in hand or deck
counters.aviana-elunes-chosen-tooltip: Show the number of turns left before Aviana's effect triggers
counters.tyrande-tooltip: Show the number of spells left that will play twice
counters.damage-taken-on-your-turn-tooltip: Gives you information on the damage your hero has taken on your turns (number of times and total damage) when some cards that make use of this info are in your hand or deck (like Sauna Regular or Party Planner Vona)
counters.locations-used-tooltip: Show the number of times you have used locations when you have cards in your hand or deck that rely on that info
counters.sea-shanty-tooltip: When you have Sea Shanty in your hand or deck, shows the number of spells you've cast on characters, as well as a detail of which spells you've cast
counters.table-flip-tooltip: Show the cost of {{cardName}}. While it's a simple calculation to do, it can be useful to have a reminder of the cost at all times
counters.wheel-of-death-tooltip: After you play {{cardName}}, shows the number of turns before your opponent dies
counters.thirsty-drifter-tooltip: When you have Thirsty Drifter in hand or deck, show the number of cards you played that cost (1)
counters.cards-played-from-another-class-tooltip: When you have Snatch and Grab in hand or deck, show the number of cards you played from another class
counters.cards-drawn-tooltip: When you have {{cardName}} in hand, show the number of cards you have drawn this game
counters.cards-drawn-this-turn-tooltip: Show the number of cards you have drawn this turn
counters.combo-cards-played-tooltip: When you have {{cardName}} in hand/deck, show the number of combo cards you have played this game
counters.spells-on-friendly-characters-tooltip: Shows the number of spells you have cast on friendly characters this game
counters.elemental-streak-tooltip: Counts how many turns in a row you have played an elemental.
counters.tram-heist-tooltip: When you have {{cardName}} in hand, show the cards that your opponent played last turn
counters.excavate-tooltip: Show your current and maximum Excavate levels, and show the treasures you can get from your next Excavate tier when mousing over the counter
counters.secrets-tooltip: When you have cards that can benefit from knowing the number of secrets you have played, show the number of secrets you have played this game
counters.lightray-tooltip: When you have Lightrays (or other cards discounted by playing Paladin cards) in hand or deck, show the number of paladin cards that you have played.
counters.holy-spells-tooltip: Show the number of holy spells that you have played. It appears when you have cards that are discounted by playing holy spells in hand or deck
counters.card-name-played-tooltip: Show the number of times you have played {{cardName}}
counters.menagerie-tooltip: When you have relevant cards in hand (One-Amalgam Band, Power Slider) or deck, see which tribes you have already played
counters.corpse-spent-tooltip: Show a counter with the total amount of corpses spent for when you have cards that can benefit from knowing that exact value (e.g. Climactic Necrotic Explosion)
counters.cards-shuffled-into-your-deck-tooltip: Counts the number of times you have shuffled cards into your deck
counters.overdraft-tooltip: Shows a counter when you have Overdraft in hand or deck that tells you how much damage it will do
counters.overload-this-game-tooltip: Show the number of mana crystals you have overloaded this game
counters.bonelord-frostwhisper-tooltip: After Bonelord Frostwhisper has died, keep track of the number of turns left to live
counters.anachronos-tooltip: After playing Anachronos, keep track of the number of turns left until minions come back
counters.runi-tooltip: Show the cards that will come back after playing {{cardName}}
counters.asvedon-tooltip: When you have Asvedon, the Grandshield in hand, show the last spell that your opponent played
counters.murozond-tooltip: When you have Murozond the Infinite in hand, shows all the cards your opponent played last turn, in the order they were played
counters.naga-giant-tooltip: Show the actual cost (after reduction) of Naga Giants when you have one in hand or in deck
counters.gardens-grace-tooltip: Show the actual cost (after reduction) of Garden's Grace cards when you have one in hand or in deck
counters.shockspitter-tooltip: When you have a Shockspitter in deck/hand, shows a widget telling you how much damage it will do next
counters.hero-attacks-tooltip: Show the number of times your hero has attacked this game, if you have cards in hand or deck that can benefit from that information
counters.parrot-mascot-tooltip: When you have a Parrot Mascot in hand, shows all the cards you played this turn, in the order they were played
counters.queensguard-tooltip: When you have a Queensguard in hand, shows the number of spells you played this turn
counters.spectral-pillager-tooltip: When you have a Spectral Pillager in hand, shows the number of cards you played this turn
counters.lady-darkvein-tooltip: When you have a Lady Darkvein in hand, show the last Shadow spell that you played, if any
counters.grey-sage-parrot-tooltip: When you have a Grey Sage Parrot in hand, show the last spell costing {{cost}} or more that you played, if any
counters.multicaster-tooltip: Mostra le scuole di incantesimi di cui hai giocato un incantesimo in questa partita

duels.title: Opzioni specifiche del duello
duels.max-health-tooltip: Scegli come mostrare la salute massima dell'avversario in una partita dei Duelli
duels.show-ooc-tracker-tooltip: Aggiungi un elenco del mazzo selezionando i tesori tra le partite. Questo ti consente di vedere le sinergie tra le carte, ad esempio.
duels.show-ooc-hero-info-tooltip: Mostra le statistiche dell'eroe/potere dell'eroe/tesoro d'autore passando col mouse sulle opzioni di gioco prima di avviare un Duello.
duels.show-ooc-deck-select-tooltip: Mostra il widget sulla schermata di creazione del mazzo che ti consente di copiare rapidamente l'ultimo mazzo da te giocato con questo eroe / potere dell'eroe / comibazione di tesori d'autore, nonché un paio di mazzi recenti dalle vittorie alte.

turn-timer.title: Timer turno
turn-timer.show-turn-timer-tooltip: Show a widget that counts the total time spent in total and in your current turn, as well as gives you an indication of how much time you have left in the round
turn-timer.show-turn-timer-match-length-tooltip: Show the total time elapsed in this match, including mulligan

lobby.title: Lobby tracker
lobby.show-lobby-tracker-tooltip: Show the decklist for the selected, on the deck selection screen

mulligan.show-mulligan-card-impact-tooltip: Show the impact of each card in your hand on your deck's winrate
mulligan.show-mulligan-deck-overview-tooltip: Show an overview of your deck with the Mulligan Impact of each card

general.title: Opzioni generali
general.show-related-cards-tooltip: When mousing over a card, also show the cards that are related to it (typically, other cards generated by it).
general.remove-duplicate-in-tooltip-tooltip: Only show one copy max of each card when mousing over certain cards in the tracker (e.g. when mousing over a card that lists dead minions)
general.show-transformed-info-tooltip: Show the card that a card was transformed into (e.g. when a card is Polymorphed into a Sheep)
general.selective-notifications-label: Puoi mostrare selettivamente le notifiche di alcune carte
general.notifications-rewards-tooltip: Mostra una notifica ogni volta che ottieni una carta da un pacchetto, tipicamente a fine stagione o dalle ricompense dell'Arena

collection.pack-stats-show-only-buyable-packs-toolt: Mostra solo i pacchetti acquistabili nel negozio, nascondendo tutti i pacchetti promozionali / di ricompense
collection.set-show-golden-stats: Mostra le statistiche per le dorate

duels.hide-stats-below-threshold-tooltip: Nascondi le statistiche con meno di {{value}} punti dati

battlegrounds.full-toggle-tooltip: Disattiva per disabilitare tutte le funzionalità live dei Campi di Battaglia

general.integrated-mode-tooltip: Quando attivata, la finestra dei campi di battaglia diventa una sovrapposizione ed è legata alla finestra di gioco. Usarla è consigliato per le configurazioni a monitor singolo o se desideri trasmettere l'app
general.enable-battle-sim-tooltip: Quando attivo, conoscerai le tue probabilità di vincita / pareggio / perdita a ogni battaglia all'inizio della battaglia
general.hide-simulation-label: Nascondi la simulazione dopo la battaglia
general.hide-simulation-tooltip: Quando attivo, i risultati della simulazione saranno nascosti una volta terminata la fase di battaglia
general.show-sim-only-in-tavern-label: Mostra la simulazione solo nella taverna
general.show-sim-only-in-tavern-tooltip: Quando attivo, i risultati della simulazione saranno nascosti durante la battaglia e mostrati una volta tornato alla taverna
general.use-remote-simulator-tooltip: Turning that on will run the battle simulations on a remote server, thus freeing your machine up. On the other hand, the results will take a bit longer to arrive
general.show-intermediate-results-tooltip: Show the intermediate results of the battle simulation, showing the odds evolve as the simulation is ongoing
general.popup-hero-selection-screen-tooltip: Quando attivo, la schermata di selezione dell'eroe, con varie statistiche su ogni scelta, apparirà all'offerta degli eroi iniziali
general.use-mmr-filter-for-live-stats-tooltip: When active, the hero ratings that are displayed on the Hero Selection screen at the start of a match will take into account your current Rating. WARNING: this may result in a low data sample size
general.use-tribes-filter-for-live-stats-tooltip: When active, the hero ratings that are displayed on the Hero Selection screen at the start of a match will take into account the tribes from the current lobby
general.use-anomaly-filter-for-live-stats-toolti: When active, the hero ratings that are displayed on the Hero Selection screen at the start of a match will take into account active Anomaly. WARNING: this may result in a low data sample size
general.show-next-opponent-recap-tooltip: Nella finestra dei CB sulla seconda schermata, mostra le info del tuo prossimo avversario in alto in un'area più grande, oltre a esser nell'elenco con tutti gli altri di seguito
general.show-achievements-tooltip: Mostra i trofei mancanti per ogni eroe alla fase di selezione dell'eroe
general.show-hero-tooltip-tooltip: Mostra le statistiche dell'eroe passando col mouse sul ritratto dell'eroe nella schermata di selezione dell'eroe del gioco.
general.show-hero-tier-tooltip: Shows hero tier and global average position directly on the hero portrait during hero selection.
general.show-hero-tips-tooltip: The Wondrous Wisdomball appears and lets you quickly see the pro tips for your current hero by mousing over it.
general.show-trinket-tips-tooltip: Show trinket tips provided by top BG players, both during the trinket selection phase in the overlay (for Premium users) or in the minions list (for everyone).
general.show-quest-stats-tooltip: Show the average turns you need to complete each of the quests being offered, and show the average final placement of players who picked their associated reward. Be sure to consider both when choosing what to pick!
general.show-trinket-stats-tooltip: Show the pick rate and average placement for the trinkets you are offered.
general.show-minions-auto-highlight-tooltip: Automatically highlight some minions in the shop based on your hero or board (for instance, Freedealing Gambler with Patches the Pirate).
general.show-tribes-auto-highlight-tooltip: Automatically highlight some tribes in the shop that you prefentially want to buy with some heroes (like Elementals with Chenvaala).
general.show-overlay-button-tooltip: Mostra un pulsante sulla sovrapposizione per attivare o disattivare la finestra principale, che puoi usare al posto dei tasti di scelta rapida
general.popup-post-match-stats-tooltip: Quando attiva, la finestra dei campi di battaglia sarà ripristinata dopo una partita per mostrare le statistiche post-partita, anche se era minimizzata
general.show-game-end-notif-tooltip: Show a small notification at the bottom right of the screen after the game ends to quickly access your game stats
general.simulator-number-of-sims-tooltip: Il numero di simulazioni eseguite per ogni battaglia. Abbiamo trovato 5.000 simulazioni per esser a buon punto. Aumentare il numero, aumenterà l'accuratezza del calcolo, ma richiederà maggiori risorse dal tuo PC.
general.max-sim-duration-tooltip: The maximum time (in milliseconds) the simulation is allowed to run. If after that time it still hasn't reached the maximum number of simulations, it will stop and give you the results it has.

overlay.show-banned-tribes-tooltip: Mostra quali tribù sono bandite all'ondata corrente
overlay.show-available-tribes-tooltip: Show available tribes instead of banned ones
overlay.show-tribe-colors-tooltip: Color each widget with the tribe color
overlay.banned-tribes-single-row-tooltip: Force the tribes to be displayed in a single row, without wrapping
overlay.show-minions-list-tooltip: Mostra l'elenco dei minion, raggruppati per rango della taverna
overlay.last-opponent-icon-tooltip: Aggiungi un'icona affianco al tuo ultimo avversario nella classifica
overlay.last-opponent-board-tooltip: Mostra la scheda dell'ultimo avversario noto (e ulteriori informazioni) al passaggio del mouse sul ritratto nella classifica
overlay.battle-simulation-tooltip: Mostra i risultati della simulazione della battaglia corrente come una sovrapposizione in alto al gioco
overlay.battle-simulation-example-tooltip: Aggiunge un pulsante per visualizzare un esempio di come il simulatore ha raggiunto un risultato specifico. ATTENZIONE: cliccare su di esso aprirà una nuova scheda nel tuo browser predefinito
overlay.banned-tribes-show-in-column-tooltip: Mostra le tribù bandite nella colonna, invece che nella riga
overlay.minions-list-show-on-mouse-over-label: Mostra l'elenco dei minion al passaggio del mouse
overlay.minions-list-show-on-mouse-over-tooltip: Quando disattivato, dovrai cliccare sulle icone di rango della taverna per mostrare l'elenco di minion
overlay.minions-list-new-header-tooltip: Use the 2-step navigation menu to reduce the clutter in the minions list
overlay.minions-list-show-on-mouse-over-confirma: Capito, ti mostreremo i dettagli dei minion solo quando cliccherai su una stella
overlay.minions-list-group-minions-into-tribes-l: Attach minions to main their tribe
overlay.minions-list-group-minions-into-tribes-t: Will include tribeless minions in Tribe sections as part of their natural tribe.
overlay.minions-list-include-trinkets-in-tribes-: Will include tribe-specific trinkets when viewing all the minions of a specific tribe.
overlay.minions-list-show-tier-7-tooltip: Will always show tier 7 minions, even when you're not Thorim.
overlay.minions-list-show-buddies-tooltip: Will always show Buddies, even when you don't currently have a means of getting one.
overlay.minions-list-show-trinkets-tooltip: When trinkets are in the game and "tribe tiers" are activated, show them in the minions list.
overlay.minions-list-show-timewarped-tooltip: When timewarped is in the game, show the timewarped cards in the cards list.
overlay.minions-list-show-all-mechanics-tooltip: Expands the Power tab to show all supported keywords
overlay.minions-list-show-single-tier-tooltip: Adds a search button that lets you filter all cards by their name/text.
overlay.minions-list-show-tribes-highlight-toolt: Aggiunge pulsanti per evidenziare tribù specifiche nella Taverna di Bob
overlay.minions-list-show-mechanics-tiers-toolti: Adds columns to the minions list that groups minions by mechanics
overlay.minions-list-show-tribe-tiers-tooltip: Adds columns to the minions list that groups minions by their tribe
overlay.minions-list-show-compositions-tooltip: Adds a tab to the minions list where you can explore the various compositions of the current meta. You need to have the "{{newHeaderOption}}" option toggled on
overlay.minions-list-show-golden-cards-tooltip: Mostra sia la versione normale che dorata delle carte al passaggio del mouse sul minion
overlay.minions-list-show-spells-at-bottom-toolt: Show the spells at the bottom of the minions list, instead of the top
overlay.minions-list-keep-in-bounds-tooltip: Make sure the list never goes too much out of bounds. Turn this off if you're not able to position the list exactly how you want it

minions-list-compositions.fade-higher-tier-cards-tooltip: Fade out cards of tiers higher than your current tavern tier

overlay.opponent-board-show-top-tooltip: Attiva/Disattiva per mostrare la scheda dell'avversario in cima o in fondo alla schermata

actions-counter.title: APM counter
actions-counter.enable-tooltip: Enable the APM counter. This tracks how many actions you've taken in the current turn as well as your APM (actions per minute)

overlay.counter-soutshsea-tooltip: Mostra il numero di pirati acquistati a questo turno (se presenti) quando Southsea Scoundrel è nel negozio o nella tua mano
overlay.counter-magmaloc-tooltip: Display the total stats your Magmaloc will get at the end of the turn
overlay.counter-blood-gem-tooltip: Display the attack/health buff of your Blood Gems
overlay.counter-beetle-tooltip: Display the attack/health buff of your Beetles
overlay.counter-elemental-buff-tooltip: Display the attack/health additional buff of your Elementals that grant stats
overlay.counter-volumizer-buff-tooltip: Display the attack/health additional buff of your Volumizer
overlay.counter-whelp-buff-tooltip: Display the attack/health additional buff of your Whelps
overlay.counter-elemental-tavern-stats-tooltip: Display the additional attack/health buff for Elementals in the Tavern
overlay.counter-tavern-stats-tooltip: Display the additional attack/health buff for minions in the Tavern
overlay.counter-tavern-spells-buff-tooltip: Display the attack/health additional buff of your Tavern Spells that grant stats
overlay.counter-baller-tooltip: Display the buff of your next Baller
overlay.counter-rightmost-tooltip: Display the buff to the right-most minion in the tavern
overlay.counter-magnetized-tooltip: Display the number of times you've magnetized this game
overlay.counter-free-refresh-tooltip: Display the number of free refreshes you have left
overlay.counter-spells-played-tooltip: Display how many groups of 4 spells you cast, and your current progress towards forming the next group
overlay.counter-undead-army-tooltip: Display the total attack buff of your Undead this game
overlay.counter-deep-blue-tooltip: Display the current buff value of your Deep Blues
overlay.counter-majordomo-tooltip: Mostra il numero di elementali giocati in questo turno (se presenti) quando Majordomo Exectutus è nel negozio, nel tuo plotone o nella tua mano
overlay.counter-gold-delta-tooltip: Display how much gold more/less you'll have next turn after taking into account cards like Careful Investment or Southsea Busker
overlay.counter-lord-of-gains-tooltip: Display how many different spells you've cast this game, as well as the name of these spells
overlay.counter-tuskarr-raider-tooltip: Display how many pirates you've played this game

session-widget.title: Widget della sessione
session-widget.label: Mostra il widget della sessione
session-widget.label-tooltip: Mostra un riepilogo della tua sessione di gioco corrente. Utile principalmente per gli streamer
session-widget.show-groups-tooltip: Mostra un riepilogo delle partite della tua sessione, raggruppate per posizione finale.
session-widget.hide-when-friends-list-open: Hide when friends list is open
session-widget.hide-when-friends-list-open-tooltip: Hide the widget when the friends list is open.
session-widget.number-of-matches-tooltip: Numero massimo di partite da mostrare visualizzando i dettagli della partita (più recenti in alto)

leaderboard.title: Leaderboard info in Overlay
leaderboard.text: These settings lets the app pull information from the official leaderboard directly into the overlay, so that you can have access to the other players' Rating information while playing.
leaderboard.text-2: IMPORTANT: You need to mouse over a player first for the app to be able to retrieve its leaderboard information.
leaderboard.text-3: WARNING: the leaderboard only have information about the top players, and we have to do a rough match by name. So if you're using this on low/medium Rating, there is a high probability that you will get incorrect information.
leaderboard.show-in-leaderboard-tooltip: Show the player name and Rating information directly on the ranking tiles in-game
leaderboard.show-in-opponent-recap-tooltip: Show the player name and Rating information alongside the last board information

notifications.title: Aggiorna quando vedi le notifiche dei trofei
notifications.achievements-enabled-tooltip: When turned off, the whole achievements tracking system will be deactivated. Keep that off if you don't plan to use Firestone to browse your existing achievements. Requires an app restart.
notifications.achievements-live-tracking-tooltip: Display a widget that shows your current progress towards any number of achievements you want to track. You can select the achievements to track in the Achievements section of the app.
notifications.firestone-achievements-tooltip: Abilita il monitoraggio esclusivo dei trofei di Firestone
notifications.show-notifications-tooltip: Mostra una notifica ogni volta che sblocchi un trofeo. Disattivarlo disattiva anche il monitoraggio dei trofei di gioco per i trofei nativi di Hearthstone

general.enabled-tooltip: Enable it if you play the Mercenaries mode, keep it disabled otherwise to improve the perfs of the app. Restart the app after changing this setting.
general.player-team-widget-tooltip: Mostra un riepilogo sovrapposto di tutti i tuoi eroi, abilità ed equipaggiamenti
general.opponent-team-widget-tooltip: Mostra un riepilogo sovrapposto di tutti gli eroi, abilità ed equipaggiamenti noti dell'avversario
general.map-team-widget-tooltip: Mostra un riepilogo sovrapposto di tutti i tuoi eroi, abilità ed equipaggiamenti sulla mappa della taglia. Utile per ispezionare facilmente il tuo team scegliendo un percorso o scegliendo un tesoro
general.village-team-widget-tooltip: Mostra un riepilogo sovrapposto di tutti i tuoi eroi, abilità e attrezzature sulla raccolta e le schermate di selezione del team
general.action-queue-pve-tooltip: Mostra un elenco ordinato di tutte le azioni accodate negli incontri PvE
general.action-queue-pvp-tooltip: Quando attivo, mostra un elenco ordinato di tutte le azioni accodate negli incontri PvP. Poiché le azioni dell'avversario sono nascoste fino alla risoluzione, questo mostrerà solo le azioni dei tuoi mercenari
general.role-chart-tooltip: Aggiungi un piccolo pulsante sotto al widget del team su cui puoi passare col mouse per mostrare un riepilogo del triangolo di danno bonus dei ruoli
general.tasks-tooltip: Aggiungi un piccolo pulsante sotto al widget del team su cui puoi passare col mouse per mostrare un riepilogo di tutte le tue attività correnti. Sempre nascosto in PvP
general.synergies-tooltip: Passando col mouse su un'abilità o un equipaggiamento (nel widget del team) o un tesoro (nella schermata di selezione del tesoro), evidenzia tutte le carte nel widget del team che abbiano sinergie con esso
general.turn-counter-battle-tooltip: Show the battle's current turn, as well as the total turns spent on the map (including the current battle)

quests.title: Choose extra spots
quests.explanation: Choose up to 6 mercenaries who will be automatically added to fill the extra spots when building a Tasks Team (taken from left to right).
quests.empty-team: You haven't built a backup team yet.

comps.description: Esplora le composizioni, sinergie e strategie di maggior successo per Campi di Battaglia per dominare le tue partite.

cards.description: Analizza le statistiche delle carte di Campi di Battaglia, le prestazioni per livello e scopri quali carte stanno plasmando il meta.

arena.description: Visualizza le statistiche degli eroi e delle carte, nonché i mazzi di successo del passato e altro, GRATIS.

constructed.description: Visualizza le statistiche delle classi, carte e mazzi, per qualsiasi fascia di grado, GRATIS.

twitch.language-auto-tooltip: Use the langauge from your Twitch preferences
twitch.adaptative-scaling-tooltip: (EXPERIMENTAL) Automatically change the size of the widgets based on your window size
twitch.scale-tooltip: Modify the size of the widgets
twitch.card-scale-tooltip: Modify the size of the cards appearing as tooltips
twitch.move-magnifier-icon-on-top-tooltip: Move the opponent's recap icon to the top of the leaderboard
twitch.could-not-log-error-title: Impossibile farti accedere al tuo profilo di Twitch
twitch.could-not-log-error-text: Sei pregato di andare alle impostazioni e riconnetterti al tuo profilo di Twitch
twitch.show-hero-cards-help-tooltip: Show the hero's hero power when mousing over a hero portrait in the leaderboard
twitch.show-related-cards-help-tooltip: When mousing over a card, also show the cards that are related to it (typically, other cards generated by it).
twitch.show-minions-list-tooltip: Mostra un widget con tutti i minion disponibili nel gioco. Puoi vedere l'intera carta, nonché la versione dorata, al passaggio del mouse
twitch.show-minions-list-golden-cards-tooltip: Mostra la versione dorata di ogni minion al passaggio del mouse sull'immagine del minion nell'elenco
twitch.last-board-size-tooltip: Cambia le dimensioni del riepilogo dell'avversario che appare al passaggio del mouse sul ritratto dell'eroe nella classifica.
twitch.hide-battle-odds-in-combat-tooltip: Don't show the battle odds while in combat
twitch.hide-battle-odds-in-tavern-tooltip: Don't show the battle odds while in the tavern (shop phase)
twitch.hide-battle-odds-when-empty-tooltip: Completely hide the battle odds widget when no odds are available, instead of showing empty info
twitch.cards-in-deck-player-tooltip: There are {{cardsInDeck}} cards in your deck and {{cardsInHand}} in your hand
twitch.cards-in-deck-opponent-tooltip: There are {{cardsInDeck}} cards in your opponent's deck and {{cardsInHand}} in their hand
